_comment: Two registration styles. Pick ONE. Channels-mode requires the stdio shim.

grill-cheese._comment_stdio_channels: RECOMMENDED — stdio shim. Required for CC Channels (push-based wakes). Launch CC with: claude --dangerously-load-development-channels server:grill-cheese

grill-cheese-http-legacy._comment_http_legacy: Direct HTTP MCP. Polling-mode only — no Channels. Kept for fallback.
